queries.question: Provide a list of all chefs and also provide a list of all Spanish-speaking servers.
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.name 
FROM Staff JOIN Languages ON Staff.LanguageID = Languages.ID
WHERE Staff.Position = "Chef" OR Staff.Position = "Server" AND Languages.Language = "Spanish"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?staff p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?staff p:name ?name .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?languages p:Language ?language_w .
  FILTER((STR(?position_w) = "Chef" || (STR(?position_w2) = "Server" && STR(?language_w) = "Spanish")))
}

queries.question: What chefs speak Spanish and what servers also speak it?
queries.sql:
SELECT Staff.name 
FROM Staff JOIN Languages ON Staff.LanguageID = Languages.ID
WHERE (Staff.Position = "Chef" OR Staff.Position = "Server") AND Languages.Language = "Spanish"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?staff a :Staff .
  ?languages a :Languages .
  ?staff p:hasLanguages ?languages .
  ?staff p:name ?name .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w .
  ?staff p:Position ?position_w2 .
  ?languages p:Language ?language_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?position_w) = "Chef" || STR(?position_w2) = "Server")) && STR(?language_w) = "Spanish"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show Spanish-speaking servers and chefs.
